# `@officer/embedded-fonts`

`@officer/embedded-fonts` owns the Rust decoder, its WebAssembly build, the
TypeScript ABI wrapper, and decoder policy/types for fonts embedded in Office
documents.

The published package contains a version-matched
`embedded_font_decoder.wasm`. Runtime consumers import the package normally and
call `loadEmbeddedFontDecoder()` only when an imported document contains
embedded fonts. The consumer owns lifecycle, caching, and font registration.

The generated WASM is intentionally not committed. CI builds it from
`rust/src`, stages it at the package root, verifies the packed tarball, and then
publishes that tarball.
